title: Red Hat Security Advisory: go-rpm-macros security update
overview:
An update for go-rpm-macros is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: go-rpm-macros security update

An update for go-rpm-macros is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for go-rpm-macros is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
go-rpm-macros-3.6.0-13.el9_7.src.rpm
go-filesystem-3.6.0-13.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
go-rpm-macros-3.6.0-13.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
go-rpm-macros-debuginfo-3.6.0-13.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
go-rpm-macros-debugsource-3.6.0-13.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
go-rpm-templates-3.6.0-13.el9_7.noarch.rpm
go-srpm-macros-3.6.0-13.el9_7.noarch.rpm
go-filesystem-3.6.0-13.el9_7.s390x.rpm
go-rpm-macros-3.6.0-13.el9_7.s390x.rpm
go-rpm-macros-debuginfo-3.6.0-13.el9_7.s390x.rpm
go-rpm-macros-debugsource-3.6.0-13.el9_7.s390x.rpm
go-filesystem-3.6.0-13.el9_7.ppc64le.rpm
go-rpm-macros-3.6.0-13.el9_7.ppc64le.rpm
go-rpm-macros-debuginfo-3.6.0-13.el9_7.ppc64le.rpm
go-rpm-macros-debugsource-3.6.0-13.el9_7.ppc64le.rpm
go-filesystem-3.6.0-13.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
go-rpm-macros-3.6.0-13.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
go-rpm-macros-debuginfo-3.6.0-13.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
go-rpm-macros-debugsource-3.6.0-13.el9_7.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-61726: A flaw was found in the net/url package in the Go standard library. The package does not enforce a limit on the number of unique query parameters it parses. A Go application using the net/http.Request.ParseForm method will try to process all parameters provided in the request. A specially crafted HTTP request containing a massive number of query parameters will cause the application to consume an excessive amount of memory, eventually causing the application to crash or become unresponsive, resulting in a denial of service.
